speaker: HERALD
text: Welcome, Resonant. The Arena has been watching you.

speaker: HERALD
text: Before the trials begin — where does your power come from?

speaker: player
text: Lifetimes of training. My body is a weapon.

speaker: player
text: Desperation. Magic saved me when nothing else would.

speaker: player
text: Self-taught, in shadows, from stolen tomes.

speaker: HERALD
text: Discipline forged in repetition. The Arena will test whether that holds under real pressure.

speaker: HERALD
text: Necessity sharpens the gift. Your fire burns bright — but will it last three trials?

speaker: HERALD
text: Knowledge stolen in darkness often cuts the deepest. Prove it.

speaker: HERALD
text: Your gift is MELDING. Two identical cards in hand — MELD them into a Tier II. Two Tier IIs into a Tier III. The merged card cycles through your discard. Find it again.

speaker: player
text: Understood. Show me the paths.

speaker: player
text: What does melding cost?

speaker: HERALD
text: AP equal to both cards combined — capped at your full 3 AP. You spend a tempo to climb. Worth it: a Tier III card is nearly unstoppable.

speaker: HERALD
text: Three paths of power. Choose the one that matches your nature.

speaker: player
text: WARRIOR — 70 HP · Strike focus · outlast anything

speaker: player
text: MAGE — 55 HP · Fireball focus · highest ceiling

speaker: player
text: ROGUE — 60 HP · Slash & bleed · status mastery

speaker: HERALD
text: The fighter's resolve, chosen by one who ran. Let that hunger be your armor.

speaker: HERALD
text: Shadow to iron. The discipline will serve you in the deep trials.

speaker: HERALD
text: Iron and endurance. The Arena chose wisely.

speaker: HERALD
text: The trained body chooses fire. Rare combination. Don't waste it.

speaker: HERALD
text: Stolen knowledge of flame. You already know how to burn without being seen.

speaker: HERALD
text: Fire and fury. Don't let them close the distance.

speaker: HERALD
text: The trained body learning subtlety. A dangerous combination. Make them bleed slowly.

speaker: HERALD
text: Desperation taught you to hide. Now let it teach you when to strike.

speaker: HERALD
text: Of course. Patient. Precise. Accumulated cuts.

speaker: WHELP
text: You come back heavier every time. Rings stacked like years — trophies of selves you don't remember being.

speaker: WHELP
text: You came back — ringed now. Marked by wins you can't recall winning.

speaker: WHELP
text: You came back wearing a ring that wasn't there before. Where did you earn it?

speaker: WHELP
text: You came back. You always come back — but this time there's something behind your eyes.

speaker: WHELP
text: You came back. You always come back, and you never once remember why.

speaker: WHELP
text: Look at me. You know me. Say you know me.

speaker: player
text: I don't know you.

speaker: player
text: ...should I?

speaker: WHELP
text: Closer. You almost had it. Put me down again — maybe it surfaces.

speaker: WHELP
text: No. You don't. Not yet. One day the door opens. Not today.

speaker: BRUTE
text: Denied the small one — and still you turn up ringed like a champion. Trophies from fights you don't even mourn. Stubborn. You always were.

speaker: BRUTE
text: Look at you. Ringed up like a victor, not a memory of the wars that earned them. Heavy, and hollow with it.

speaker: BRUTE
text: The small one told me. You denied it to its face. Stubborn — you always were.

speaker: BRUTE
text: Still wandering in blind. Still no idea what you're clawing your way back toward.

speaker: BRUTE
text: But you've walked this before. The shape of you remembers even when the rest won't.

speaker: BRUTE
text: Hit me hard enough and maybe it shakes something loose. It never has yet.

speaker: player
text: There's nothing to remember.

speaker: player
text: Then knock it loose.

speaker: CORE
text: Rings. Accretion. You log every trophy and lose the one record that matters. Predictable.

speaker: CORE
text: You run the loop again. Input, struggle, forget. I have counted your returns. You have not.

speaker: CORE
text: The big one says you reached for it. Reaching is not remembering — but it is a nonzero value. Unusual, for you.

speaker: CORE
text: You will dismantle me and feel nothing. As designed.

speaker: WARDEN
text: Back, and decorated — two rings turning, maybe more. I kept the gate the whole while you were gone. Somebody had to.

speaker: WARDEN
text: Back already. The gate remembers your hand even when your hand forgets the gate.

speaker: WARDEN
text: Ask me what I keep behind it. Go on. Ask.

speaker: player
text: What do you guard?

speaker: player
text: Nothing worth keeping.

speaker: RAMPART
text: You wear the wins on the outside now — rings turning, bright. Inside still hollow as a struck drum.

speaker: RAMPART
text: Still hollow. Still throwing yourself at walls, hoping one of them gives.

speaker: RAMPART
text: I was raised to hold a line you drew. You don't remember drawing it. Tear me down anyway — you always do.

speaker: WELLSPRING
text: So many rings, and not one of them water. You collect the shape of returning and never the source of it.

speaker: WELLSPRING
text: You came back thirsty and can't say for what. I am where you used to drink.

speaker: WELLSPRING
text: It's rising in you. Slowly. Spill me and let it rise the faster.

speaker: WELLSPRING
text: Not today. The well is deep and you are shallow this time through. Come back deeper.

speaker: SENTINEL
text: Three rings. Four. A whole reliquary orbiting a thing that cannot name itself. I have stood here every time you arrived wearing them.

speaker: SENTINEL
text: You reach the deep ones now. The marks that knew you best. We are harder to forget — and you will manage it anyway.

speaker: SENTINEL
text: The Warden said you asked what it guards. It guards this: the road back to yourself. I am the last gate on that road.

speaker: SENTINEL
text: I will not tell you what I keep. You have to want it first. You never have.

speaker: BASTION
text: Ringed like a monument to wars no one attended but us. A heavy crown on a light head.

speaker: BASTION
text: Almost to the mirror now. You can feel it — the shape at the end of the road, wearing your walk.

speaker: BASTION
text: Break me and there is one wall left standing. It looks exactly like you. It always has.

speaker: MAW
text: Come closer, ringed one. All those trophies, and still the hungriest thing in the room is the hole where your name should sit.

speaker: MAW
text: You always taste the same. Empty. I could swallow you whole and learn nothing you don't already refuse to know.

speaker: MAW
text: But it has almost surfaced. One more swallow. Put me down and step into your own reflection.

speaker: MAW
text: Feed me. Maybe what you give up, I hand back.

speaker: player
text: Take it, then.

speaker: player
text: I keep what is mine.

speaker: WISP
text: You flicker into view ringed and weighted, and I am the one called insubstantial. I remember you when you were lighter than me.

speaker: WISP
text: You came back thinner than a thought. So did I. We were always the parts of each other that wouldn't hold.

speaker: WISP
text: You've walked further than this before. Say you feel it. Lie if you have to.

speaker: player
text: I feel nothing.

speaker: player
text: I feel the edges.

speaker: HUSK
text: The wisp said you felt nothing. Of course. We match — two shells knocking, neither one home.

speaker: HUSK
text: Hollow meets hollow. At least I know what I am: the part of you that stayed empty on purpose.

speaker: HUSK
text: All those rings, ringing on the outside of a shell. Crack me open and listen — same silence in us both.

speaker: HUSK
text: Break me. There's nothing in here to spill. There never was. You made sure.

speaker: BLOOM
text: You come back ringed and grim while I come back flowering. I grew from the parts of you that wanted to stay.

speaker: BLOOM
text: Every loop I open a little wider; every loop you close. We are the same root, choosing differently.

speaker: BLOOM
text: The wisp said you reached. Good. Cut me down and let what blooms in me settle back into you.

speaker: BLOOM
text: Wilt me, then. I'll only grow back. So will you. That was always the trouble.

speaker: ZEALOT
text: You wear your wins like relics and believe in none of them. I carry no shield because I believe in everything. Pity we can't trade.

speaker: ZEALOT
text: You came back doubting, as you do. I never doubt. That is the only difference between us — and it is the whole world.

speaker: ZEALOT
text: Strike me down. I'll go gladly. Conviction doesn't need to survive to be right.

speaker: PHALANX
text: One ringed figure against a wall of us. You were a line in this formation once — before you broke ranks to go forgetting.

speaker: PHALANX
text: We hold together because we remember why we stand. You stand alone because you can't. Come. Test the wall.

speaker: PHALANX
text: You've cracked us before. The shape of the gap you leave is starting to look like a name.

speaker: PHALANX
text: Push through if you can. There is only more of you on the other side.

speaker: THICKET
text: Rings turning above the bramble. You tended your trophies and let the rest of yourself grow over, wild and nameless.

speaker: THICKET
text: Every return you neglect a little more, and I fill the space. I am everything about you left untended.

speaker: THICKET
text: Burn me back. Clear the path. You won't like how short it is to the center.

speaker: NULLITY
text: Rings, marks, trophies — and underneath, me. I am the erasing you do between every loop. I keep what you throw away. It is mostly you.

speaker: NULLITY
text: You unmake yourself each time the door shuts. I am made of the unmade. Hello again. You won't remember saying it.

speaker: NULLITY
text: You reached, early on. Reach again now, while I take this from you, and maybe the subtraction comes out positive.

speaker: NULLITY
text: Undo me and you only undo a little less of yourself. Best offer you've had in a hundred returns.

speaker: COLOSSUS
text: All your little rings, turning. I am the size of everything you've forgotten. Set your trophies against that and see what they weigh.

speaker: COLOSSUS
text: You are so small against what you don't remember. And still you come. I'll grant you that — you always come.

speaker: COLOSSUS
text: You've toppled me before. Each time you stand on the rubble a little taller. Climb. The mirror is just past my shoulder.

speaker: COLOSSUS
text: Move me if you can. There is a road behind me you carved yourself.

speaker: LEVIATHAN
text: Ringed and crowned, and still you sink the same. I am every depth you went down into and came back up forgetting.

speaker: LEVIATHAN
text: You drown here every loop. You surface every loop. You never once bring anything back from the bottom. I am the bottom.

speaker: LEVIATHAN
text: But you hold your breath longer now. Put me under. What waits past me is wearing your face.

speaker: LEVIATHAN
text: Go down swinging if you must. The thing after me will look like you and know you better than this water does.

speaker: player
text: Then let me drown.

speaker: player
text: I've held my breath before.

speaker: YOUR ECHO
text: Look at us. The same rings, turning the same way — I won them the times you did. And still you don't know your own face.

speaker: YOUR ECHO
text: You don't even know your own face. After every one of them tried to show you.

speaker: YOUR ECHO
text: But it's sticking now. You've stood here before. Finish me and you keep a little more of it.

speaker: YOUR ECHO
text: You'll beat me. You'll return to the Meld. And you still won't understand what you returned to — not the first time.

speaker: player
text: I am not you.

speaker: player
text: Then tell me what I am.

speaker: YOUR ECHO
text: You already know. You just won't say it yet. Come on. Again.

speaker: YOUR ECHO
text: No. You have to arrive there yourself. Come back when you can.

speaker: WHELP
text: Down again — but you almost held my face that time. Almost. Next door. Go.

speaker: WHELP
text: Down again. You'll forget me before the next door. One of these times you won't. I'll wait.

speaker: BRUTE
text: You reached, and got a fistful of nothing. Still more than you came with. Move.

speaker: BRUTE
text: Knocked loose — nothing. Figures. The next one knew you better than I did anyway.

speaker: WARDEN
text: The gate opens. It always opens for you, and you always walk through it empty-handed. Go on.

speaker: RAMPART
text: A wall comes down and for half a breath you feel the wind behind it. Did you? ...No. Onward.

speaker: SENTINEL
text: The last gate gives. The road to your own face is open — and this time you are looking at it.

speaker: SENTINEL
text: The last gate gives. What waits ahead wears your shape. Try not to flinch from it.

speaker: BASTION
text: One wall left, and it is you. I held as long as stone can. I am sorry it has to be a mirror.

speaker: WISP
text: I scatter so easily — so do you. Carry a piece of me down with you. Maybe it sticks this time.

speaker: HUSK
text: Cracked open, and nothing rattles out. Told you. Go be hollow nearer the center.

speaker: ZEALOT
text: I die certain; you live doubting. Tell me who got the better end of it. ...You can't. Go.

speaker: PHALANX
text: Ranks broken. The gap I leave still has your shape in it. Fill it someday. You, maybe.

speaker: NULLITY
text: You unmade the unmaker. Less of you to lose now. Spend what is left carefully past here.

speaker: COLOSSUS
text: Moved, at last. Stand on the rubble — higher — yes. Now you can see who waits. You know him.

speaker: COLOSSUS
text: Something my size, and you moved it. Stand tall on what is left. You can almost see who is waiting.

speaker: (no name — the lost form)
text: So I lose to myself. Of course. The shape gives out — and you, of all things, know exactly what I am beneath it.

speaker: (no name — the lost form)
text: Down again, {foe}. You always could put me down. It changes nothing about what comes next.

speaker: (no name — the lost form)
text: So that is it, {foe}. The form gives out. I thought it would hold longer than this.

speaker: (no name — the lost form)
text: But this is not the end of it. It never is. I come back. And if not this shape, then something near enough to me you will not tell us apart — and it will walk the same road to your door.{ rings>=2: Rings and all — it comes to the same return.}

speaker: (no name — the lost form)
text: It does not end here. I cannot say how I know that. I come back — or something like me does, wearing my hunger, and it finds the same way to you.{ rings>=2: Rings and all — it comes to the same return.}
